message:
feat(cli): integrate resize dashboard into status and watch commands (wa-1u90p.5)

Wire the resize dashboard renderer into the two primary status surfaces
(IPC-based watcher status and direct-query fallback) so that resize
control-plane telemetry is surfaced in both JSON and human-readable output.

Helper functions (new):
- health_diagnostics_to_json(): convert &[HealthDiagnostic] to a
  Vec<serde_json::Value> using the new stable as_str() labels, replacing
  three inline format!("{:?}") blocks that produced Debug-formatted enum
  variants (e.g., "Warning" instead of the now-canonical "warning")
- attach_resize_dashboard_from_status_payload(): extract a
  ResizeDashboardSnapshot from a watcher status payload and inject
  "resize_dashboard" and "resize_diagnostics" keys into the response

IPC watcher status handler changes:
- Forward resize_control_plane, resize_control_plane_stalled,
  resize_control_plane_watchdog, and resize_degradation_ladder keys
  from the watcher status response into the status payload
- Call attach_resize_dashboard_from_status_payload() to populate the
  composed dashboard and its diagnostic checks
- Replace inline diagnostic JSON formatting with health_diagnostics_to_json()

Direct-query status fallback changes:
- After populating resize_control_plane and stalled transactions from
  the global scheduler snapshot, also evaluate the resize watchdog and
  derive the degradation ladder, injecting both into the payload
- Call attach_resize_dashboard_from_status_payload() as fallback when
  the dashboard wasn't already populated from IPC

`ft status` command integration:
- Extract health snapshot and run diagnostic_checks() when health data
  is present in the watcher response (previously only the IPC path did this)
- Forward all four resize_control_plane_* keys from watcher status
- Call attach_resize_dashboard_from_status_payload() for dashboard composition
- Add fallback paths: when watcher doesn't provide health, control_plane,
  or watchdog data, query global state directly (HealthSnapshot::get_global,
  ResizeSchedulerDebugSnapshot::get_global, evaluate_resize_watchdog)
- Render the resize dashboard compact block in human-readable mode
  between the health output and crash bundle sections

`ft watch` command integration:
- Preserve watcher_status_payload for downstream dashboard extraction
- Compute watcher_resize_dashboard from the status payload
- Render compact resize dashboard in the watch loop output when present

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
